- Overnight: Moab

**DAY 3 (July 27): Moab to Las Vegas via Utah Parks**
- Distance: 350 miles | Driving Time: 5 hours
- Route: US-191 South to I-70 West
- Stops: Valley of the Gods scenic drive (1 hour), Monument Valley viewpoint
- Overnight: Las Vegas, Nevada

**DAY 4 (July 28): Las Vegas to San Diego**
- Distance: 330 miles | Driving Time: 5 hours
- Route: I-15 South through Mojave Desert
- Stops: Cajon Pass scenic views, Victorville roadside attractions
- Overnight: San Diego, California
- Activities: Sunset Cliffs Natural Park, Gas Lamp Quarter exploration

**DAY 5 (July 29): San Diego Exploration**
- Distance: Local (30 miles)

- Route: I-5 North to US-101 North (Pacific Coast Highway begins)
- Stops: Laguna Beach scenic overlooks, Hearst Castle viewpoint
- Overnight: Carmel-by-the-Sea (near Big Sur)

**DAY 7 (July 31): Big Sur Scenic Drive & Hiking**
- Distance: 90 miles (scenic drive) | Driving Time: 3-4 hours

**DAY 8 (Aug 1): Monterey & Yosemite Approach**
- Distance: 130 miles | Driving Time: 2.5 hours

- Overnight: Mariposa (gateway to Yosemite)

**DAY 9 (Aug 2): Yosemite National Park - Day 1**
- Distance: 50 miles to park | Driving Time: 1.5 hours
- Route: CA-140 into Yosemite Valley

  * Yosemite Falls Trail (7.2 miles, strenuous, 4-5 hours) OR Lower Falls (1.5 miles, moderate, 1.5 hours)
  * Glacier Point scenic drive (30 min drive, panoramic views)
- Overnight: Yosemite Valley Lodge

**DAY 10 (Aug 3): Yosemite National Park - Day 2 & Redwoods**
- Morning: Yosemite
  * Mirror Lake Loop (5 miles, easy, 2 hours)

- Afternoon: Drive toward Redwoods (280 miles, 5 hours)
- Route: CA-120 East to I-5 North to US-101 North
- Overnight: Eureka, California (Redwood region)

**DAY 11 (Aug 4): Redwood National & State Parks**
- Distance: 60 miles | Driving Time: 2 hours
